subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! It hath been some time since joyful tidings, like unto the fragrant breeze from the rose-garden of love, have reached us from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چندیست که خبرهای خوش چون نسیم گلشن عشق از شما نرسیده و مشام
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
